source.book: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析6》

segments.text: Good morning everyone, I'm Sally, tour guide from Travelite Travel Agency.
segments.translation: 大家早上好，我是萨莉（Sally），来自Travelite旅行社的导游。

segments.text: Today I'm going to introduce a great trip to Southern Scotland for you.
segments.translation: 今天我要给大家介绍一趟很棒的苏格兰南部之旅。

segments.text: I'm sure you will find it a fantastic place.
segments.translation: 我保证你们会觉得那是个绝妙的地方。

segments.text: There is lots to see in Southern Scotland.
segments.translation: 苏格兰南部有很多值得一看的地方。

segments.text: To begin with, we will go to Sheepfoul, which has one or two beautiful gardens.
segments.translation: 首先，我们会去Sheepfoul，那里有一两座漂亮的花园。

segments.text: One thing that's definitely worth doing is climbing to the top of the mountain.
segments.translation: 有件事绝对值得一做，那就是爬到山顶。

segments.text: You will be fascinated by the beautiful scenery alongside the mountain road.
segments.translation: 沿着山路的美景一定会让你着迷。

segments.text: When you get to the top, you can overlook the coastline and enjoy the stunning view.
segments.translation: 等你到了山顶，就能俯瞰整条海岸线，欣赏那令人惊叹的景色。

segments.text: From there we will go on to Brown Mare.
segments.translation: 从那儿我们会接着前往Brown Mare。

segments.text: Brown Mare used to be famous for its farm, but it is being refurbished at the moment and isn't likely to be reopened by the time we go there.
segments.translation: Brown Mare过去以它的农场闻名，不过现在正在翻修，我们去的时候多半还没重新开放。

segments.text: But you can walk for hours there in the peaceful green surroundings along a wide variety of tracks.
segments.translation: 但你可以在那片宁静的绿色环境里，沿着各种各样的小径散步好几个小时。

segments.text: I think you will be struck by the beautiful roses in Mother Nature.
segments.translation: 我想大自然中那些美丽的玫瑰一定会让你惊艳。

segments.text: In Doris, there were several old barns, but they have been converted into a special section where animals and plants are protected.
segments.translation: 在Doris，原本有几座旧谷仓，不过它们已经被改建成了一个专门保护动植物的区域。

segments.text: From there you can see a range of rare breeds as well as flowers.
segments.translation: 在那里你能看到一系列稀有品种，还有各种花卉。

segments.text: This place is usually favoured by university students as a destination for their field trips.
segments.translation: 这个地方通常很受大学生欢迎，是他们实地考察的热门去处。

segments.text: Then we will go to Lodge Estate, which is the most favourite location for children as they can watch the baby deer.
segments.translation: 接着我们会去Lodge Estate，那是孩子们最喜欢的地方，因为他们可以看小鹿。

segments.text: But remember, don't give food to them.
segments.translation: 不过记住，别喂它们东西吃。

segments.text: Photography is allowed there, and when you leave you can get one free photo at the exit.
segments.translation: 那里是可以拍照的，而且离开的时候，你能在出口领到一张免费照片。

segments.text: But please don't move rocks or branches to take photos.
segments.translation: 但请不要为了拍照去搬石头或者折树枝。

segments.text: You should leave the site intact.
segments.translation: 你应该让景点保持原样。

segments.text: Our next stop is Aurden.
segments.translation: 我们下一站是Aurden。

segments.text: I strongly recommend that you visit the ancient town which was constructed nearly 1,000 years ago.
segments.translation: 我强烈建议大家去参观那座古镇，它是将近一千年前建造的。

segments.text: There is not much of the original buildings left, but still plenty to see.
segments.translation: 原来的建筑没剩下多少了，但还是有很多值得看的东西。

segments.text: The site is being excavated, and you will be able to help out if you want to.
segments.translation: 这个遗址正在发掘中，如果你愿意的话，还可以搭把手帮忙。

segments.text: Finally, we will spend some time in Eastlake, which changes with the seasons with different events happening at different times of the year.
segments.translation: 最后，我们会在Eastlake待上一段时间，那里随四季变化，一年中不同时节会有不同的活动。

segments.text: At the moment when we arrive there, it will be the most spectacular month with the arrival of Canada geese.
segments.translation: 我们到那儿的时候，正赶上最壮观的月份，加拿大雁会成群飞来。

segments.text: I'm pretty sure that this visit will give you an unforgettable experience.
segments.translation: 我敢肯定，这次参观会给你们带来一段难忘的体验。

segments.text: Some of you have asked me about the place where we're going to stay.
segments.translation: 你们有些人问过我我们要住在哪儿。

segments.text: So, next I will introduce different types of accommodation there.
segments.translation: 所以接下来我给大家介绍一下那里几种不同的住宿方式。

segments.text: First, many tourists may consider visiting a bed and breakfast, also called a B&B, as they don't have to be worried about what to eat in the morning.
segments.translation: 首先，很多游客可能会考虑住民宿，也就是所谓的B&B（住宿加早餐），因为这样早上就不用发愁吃什么了。

segments.text: But you have to pay attention that this type of accommodation is only available on a daily basis.
segments.translation: 但你们得注意，这种住宿只能按天预订。

segments.text: The cheapest possible option is to stay in a hostel, but you should be aware that sometimes you are provided with only a single bed with several people sharing the same room, and meals are not included.
segments.translation: 最省钱的选择是住青年旅舍，不过你要有心理准备，有时候只提供一张单人床，还得跟好几个人合住一间房，而且不含餐。

segments.text: But some people think they have never had such an experience before that they want to have a try.
segments.translation: 但有些人觉得自己以前从没有过这种经历，就想试一试。

segments.text: More importantly, they don't have to change accommodation for a whole week.
segments.translation: 更重要的是，他们一整周都不用换地方住。

segments.text: For those who want to visit the castles, I recommend you stay in the cottages nearby with beautiful surroundings.
segments.translation: 对于想去参观城堡的人，我建议你们住在附近的小屋里，那儿环境很美。

segments.text: The owner promises that the rent can be paid every seven days, so just be relieved to have a peaceful life there.
segments.translation: 屋主承诺房租可以每七天付一次，所以尽管放心，在那儿好好享受一段安宁的日子吧。

segments.text: For our members, I will introduce some benefits you can get from our travel agency.
segments.translation: 针对我们的会员，我来介绍几项你们能从我们旅行社获得的福利。

segments.text: As for the accommodation I just mentioned, someone has asked if we offer a discount.
segments.translation: 关于我刚提到的住宿，有人问我们提不提供折扣。

segments.text: I'm afraid to tell you this is only for premium members who can benefit from 10% off the original price.
segments.translation: 很抱歉，这个只对高级会员开放，他们能享受原价九折的优惠。

segments.text: For those self-driving travellers, you might be interested in the parking service.
segments.translation: 对于那些自驾游的游客，你们可能会对停车服务感兴趣。

segments.text: Parking space is always limited at the hotel, so we only offer free parking service to premium members as well.
segments.translation: 酒店的停车位一向很紧张，所以我们同样只对高级会员提供免费停车服务。

segments.text: I'm afraid ordinary members have to pay a fee for parking.
segments.translation: 很抱歉，普通会员停车得付费。

segments.text: The good news is, all of you can enjoy our guide service without any charge, including the visit to attractions like the castles.
segments.translation: 好消息是，你们所有人都能免费享受我们的导游服务，包括参观城堡这类景点。

segments.text: But remember, the entrance fee has to be paid by yourself.
segments.translation: 但记住，门票得你们自己出。

segments.text: Oh, I nearly forgot, you can also receive regular copies of magazines about the native food and attractions in Scotland absolutely for free.
segments.translation: 哦对了，我差点忘了，你们还能定期免费收到介绍苏格兰当地美食和景点的杂志。

segments.text: It's a gift for you.
segments.translation: 这是送给你们的礼物。

segments.text: I hope you will like it.
segments.translation: 希望你们会喜欢。

segments.text: OK, that's all I want to share today.
segments.translation: 好，今天我要分享的就这些。

segments.text: If you have any more questions about the trip, please call me at …
segments.translation: 如果你们对这趟行程还有什么问题，请打电话给我，号码是……
